# THRIVE Source Pack v1.0

**Product:** THRIVE — Wellness Services Marketer & Manager Complete AI OS<br>
**Program ID:** `WELLMKT-AIOS-THRIVE-COMPLETE-1.0`<br>
**Canonical source components:** 17

These modular files are for review, maintenance and integrity comparison. For installation, give Hermes the descriptive one-file installer in the deliverables folder. Do not install individual source components or infer runtime readiness from their presence.
